modeling_constraints: Use deterministic event-driven voltage-domain comparator state.
Drive the output contribution outside threshold-crossing event blocks.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: At initialization, OUT_P reflects the sign of VINP minus VINN.
When VINP crosses above VINN, OUT_P transitions to the VDD rail.
When VINP crosses below VINN, OUT_P transitions to the VSS rail.
Repeated differential crossings in either direction update the retained decision without requiring a clock or reset.
OUT_P is rail-referenced and changes with finite transition smoothing set by tedge.

title: Threshold Comparator
